name: io.github.conorbronsdon/gws-mcp-server
title: Google Workspace MCP Server
description: Google Workspace as 39 curated MCP tools: Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets, Docs, and Tasks.

packageArguments.name: --services
packageArguments.description: Comma-separated list of Google services to expose (drive,sheets,calendar,docs,gmail,tasks). Defaults to all.

packageArguments.name: --gws-path
packageArguments.description: Path to the gws binary if not on PATH.
